creator: fujimoto@oscar.elec.waseda.ac.jp
text:
I would like to contribute a new ports collection named
`automake-1.0'(ftp://www.freebsd.org/incoming/automake-1.0-port.tar.gz).
automake-1.0 is a GNU standards-compliant Makefile generator.
Please have a look at it.

Sincerely yours,
			FUJIMOTO Kensaku
                        fujimoto@oscar.elec.waseda.ac.jp
